description: After receiving an item, the WMS must direct the operator to the best possible storage bin, considering space, item type, and existing stock.

nodes.task_description: An operator scans a newly received item.
The system analyzes put-away rules: first, it looks for an existing pick face for that item with available capacity.

expected_outcome.value: The system checks for a primary location to top-off.

nodes.task_description: Finding no room in the pick face, the system then finds the closest available bulk storage location that can fit the pallet.

expected_outcome.value: The system suggests an optimal bulk storage bin.

nodes.task_description: The system creates a put-away task directing the operator to the suggested location.

expected_outcome.value: The operator receives a clear instruction for where to store the item.
